title: Benjamin Tallmadge and the Culper Ring
author: Roughdraft Stories
description: Benjamin Tallmadge helped build the Continental Army's most effective spy network. This factual narrative follows him from Long Island and Yale into the hidden war of codes, boats, couriers, and secrets around British-occupied New York.

chapters.title: A Young Officer Learns the Cost of Failure
Building a Spy Ring in Occupied New York
Codes, Couriers, and the Narrow Edge of Discovery
The Secret War and the Republic That Followed
